reviews.comment:
Muy buena para cargar yendo a Córdoba, ya que es la última que pertenece a Santa Fe y no cobra el impuesto cordobés

(Translated by Google)
Very good for charging up on the way to Córdoba, as it is the last one that belongs to Santa Fe and does not charge the Córdoba tax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMnV1WDl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A pesar del fin de semana largo había poca demora para cargar y buena la atención. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Despite the long weekend, there were few delays in loading and the service was good. The bathrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NU1HMVJnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service, you can pay by card, you almost never have to wait to top up.

reviews.comment:
Un oasis donde recargar  combustible las 24hs de día parque arbolado, mesas y un minimercado donde comprar o comer algo, tenés que baja de la autovía, pero vale la pena

(Translated by Google)
An oasis where you can refuel 24 hours a day, a wooded park, tables, and a mini-market where you can buy or eat something. You have to get off the highway, but it's worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNE5lUzlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer una parada de descanso en viaje BsAs Córdoba, el lugar está. Muy bien mantenido, trato cordial, buen entorno natural, aceptable cafetería. Vale la pena salir de la autopista un par de km y parar aquí.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place for a rest stop on the road from Buenos Aires to Córdoba. Very well maintained, friendly service, beautiful natural surroundings, and a decent cafeteria. It's worth stopping off the highway for a couple of kilometers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneWVLMVZBEAE
